LAW AND MOTION 302,DEFENDANT SUSAN BAILEY'S MOTION TO DISMISS THIS ACTION DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO SERVE THE COMPLAINT WITHIN THREE YEARS IS GRANTED. MR. REA HAS NOT SHOWN THAT HIS FAILURE TO SERVE DR. BAILEY WITHIN THREE YEARS OF FILING THIS CASE WAS IMPOSSIBLE, IMPRACTICABLE OR FUTILE DUE TO CAUSES BEYOND HIS CONTROL. WHILE THE COURT IS VERY SYMPATHETIC TO MR. REA'S PHYSICAL AND MENTAL HEALTH ISSUES, MR. REA HAS NOT SHOWN THAT ANY OF THOSE ISSUES PREVENTED HIM FROM SERVING DR. BAILEY WITHIN THE MANDATORY THREE YEAR PERIOD. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR# 8600 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Susan A. Bailey Md To Dismiss This Action Due To Plaintiff'S Failure To Serve The Complaint Within Three Years, Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 583.210 - 583.250
Off Calendar Aug-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Dominic Rea - Plaintiff appearing in pro per;
Atty. Lisa T. Ungere of the Law Offices of Rankin, Sproat, ires 7 Mintz, Tel. No.
1-510-465-3922 appearing for the Defendant Susan Bailey.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Susan Bailey's motion to dismiss this action due to plaintiff's failure to serve the complaint within three years is granted. Mr. Rea has not shown that his failure to serve Dr. Bailey within three years of filing this case was impossible, impracticable or futile due to causes beyond his control. While the court is very sympathetic to Mr. Rea's physical and mental health issues, Mr. Rea has not shown that any of those issues prevented him from serving Dr. Bailey within the mandatory three year period. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to CCP 583.210 and 583.250. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Susan A. Bailey Md To Dismiss This Action Due To Plaintiff'S Failure To Serve The Complaint Within Three Years, Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 583.210 - 583.250
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Continued To Aug-14-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Dominic Rea, tel. No. 1-415-678-7343, Plaintiff appearing in pro per;
Atty. Lisa T. Ungere of the Law Office of Rankin, Sproat et. al.,
Tel. No. 1-510-465-3922, appearing for the Defendant.

RULING - The matter was argued regarding service. Defendant Susan Bailey's motion to dismiss this action due to plaintiff's failure to serve the complaint is continued to August 14, 2018. Opposition to be filed by July 26, 2018. Reply to be filed by August 7, 2018;
If no opposition papers are filed by July 26, the motion will be granted. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR # 8600 =302/hk
